title: Macron arrives in Syria for first post-Assad visit by western European leader

title: Hungary could vote to oust president as early as next week as opposition complains of 'tyranny'

title: Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella pledge unity ahead of judicial verdict

title: How Europe made most, but not all, of its swimming waters 'excellent'
content: Planning a swim this summer? Chances are you'll be diving into clean water. But why are some swimming spots still unsafe?
